Sources.Title: Kevin Stock — laboratory report for the 27 September 2018 draw

TranscriptionNotes: The report header is dated 1 October 2018; the biomarker date is the specimen collection time shown in the report, 27 September 2018 at 09:05.
The source reports hs-CRP as below 0.2 mg/L. The stored value is the published assay limit, following the World Cup detection-limit rule; it is not presented as an exact measured concentration.
AgeYears is Kevin Stock's age at the draw, calculated from the date of birth and collection date shown in the report and rounded to two decimals.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
